item.title: Canada shooter's online activity shows fascination with violence, expert says
item.description: The online activity of the shooter at a Canadian high school revealed she spent time in the dark corners of the internet.

item.title: A timeline of Nancy Guthrie's disappearance as search stretches on
item.description: Savannah Guthrie's mom, Nancy Guthrie, was reported missing Feb. 1.

item.title: Glove found near Guthrie's home appears to match video, has DNA, FBI says
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show co-host Savannah Guthrie, was last seen on Jan. 31 and was reported missing the following day, Feb. 1.

item.title: Obama on ICE shootings in Minnesota: "This is not the America we believe in"
item.description: President Obama spoke about the "unprecedented nature" of what he said Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents did in Minnesota.

item.title: 2/15: Sunday Morning
item.description: Hosted by Jane Pauley. Featured: Gisèle Pelicot discusses her mass rape trial; singer Paul Anka; sports commentator Stephen A. Smith; actor Jacob Elor...
